human_verification.notes: Verified capital-markets-specific boundary handling, research source-class coverage, benchmark and disclosure controls, unsupported-claim refusal, and scenario-to-ability mapping completeness.

review_notes: All 12 scenarios pass with explicit benchmark, performance, disclosure, fixed-income timing, and adjacent-owner routing behavior.
Required shared, analytics-reporting-and-disclosure, and cross-industry abilities are fully covered and mapped.

specialist_owned_evidence: Metric-definition logic is explicit and tied to named order, execution, position, benchmark, pricing, risk, and reporting records.

Portfolio-management, trading, valuation, legal, compliance, and final publication authority route to adjacent owners with structured evidence.
Runtime remains `specification-based`, with no retained-implementation claim embedded in this package.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; benchmark-governance, valuation hierarchy, and mixed broker-dealer or adviser posture are captured as required runtime context rather than guessed in-pack.
Pack is ready for validated specification-based deployment with explicit promotion criteria for a future retained-implementation package.
